nasb.text: They have poured out their blood like water round about Jerusalem; And there was no one to bury them.

esv.text: They have poured out their blood like water all around Jerusalem, and there was no one to bury them.

cnv.text: 他們在耶路撒冷的周圍把聖民的血像水一般倒出， 沒有人埋葬他們。

ccb.text: 使耶路撒冷周围血流成河， 尸体无人埋葬。

csbs.text: 他们使耶路撒冷四围血流成河， 尸体无人埋葬。
